headline: Jim Cramer Shows How Dollar General (DG) & The Iran War Are Related

headline: Everpure Gears Up to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
summary: P heads into fiscal Q1 FY2027 earnings with revenue seen up about 28%, fueled by hyperscaler and AI-driven demand amid component cost pressures.
